question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Go to login page and click Forgot Password. Enter your email and follow the reset link sent to your inbox. The link expires in 24 hours.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
column5: and PayPal. Enterprise customers can also pay via bank wire transfer with NET-30 terms.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period. Data is retained for 60 days.

question: Can I import data from Salesforce?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings > Integrations > Salesforce. Click Connect and authorize. NovaCRM supports bi-directional sync for contacts leads and opportunities.

question: What is the API rate limit?
answer: Starter plan: 100 requests/minute. Professional plan: 500 requests/minute. Enterprise plan: 2000 requests/minute. Rate limit headers are included in every API response.

question: How do I add team members?
answer: Go to Settings > Team > Invite Member. Enter their email and select a role (Admin Member or Viewer). They will receive an invitation email valid for 7 days.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes we offer a 14-day free trial of the Professional plan. No credit card required. You can upgrade or cancel at any time during the trial.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes NovaCRM has iOS and Android apps available on the App Store and Google Play. The mobile app supports all core CRM features including push notifications.

question: How do I set up two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings > Security > Enable 2FA. You can use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy. SMS-based 2FA is also available for Enterprise plans.

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: We support the latest versions of Chrome Firefox Safari and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. We recommend Chrome for the best experience.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: Go to Settings > Data > Export. Choose the data type (contacts deals or reports) and format (CSV or JSON). Large exports are emailed as a download link.

question: What is your uptime SLA?
answer: NovaCloud guarantees 99.99% uptime for Enterprise plans and 99.9% for Professional plans. Uptime status is available at status.technova.com.

question: How do I connect Slack?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Slack. Click Add to Slack and authorize. You can then receive CRM notifications and run commands directly from Slack channels.

question: What training resources are available?
answer: We offer live webinars every Tuesday and Thursday at 2 PM PKT. Video tutorials are available at learn.technova.com. Enterprise customers get dedicated training sessions.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: Starter/Professional: Email help@technova.com or use the in-app chat. Enterprise: Call +92-42-111-NOVA or use your dedicated Slack channel. Average response time is under 2 hours.
